ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the county belongs */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the county area covered by forests */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fia_plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIA plot */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the FIA plot is located */,
  "fia_plot_number" TEXT /* Identifier for the FIA plot within the county */,
  "plot_area" REAL /* Area of the FIA plot in square meters */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of the plot (e.g., deciduous, coniferous) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the plot in meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the plot */,
  "last_surveyed" TEXT /* Date when the plot was last surveyed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fia_plots_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the FIA plot associated with the measurement */,
  "mean_carbon" REAL /* Mean carbon content measured in the plot */,
  "sd_carbon" REAL /* Standard deviation of carbon measurements */,
  "min_carbon" REAL /* Minimum carbon content measured in the plot */,
  "max_carbon" REAL /* Maximum carbon content measured in the plot */,
  "measurement_year" INTEGER /* Year during which the measurement was taken */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carbon metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the measurement */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the measurement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurement data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_measurements_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES fia_plots ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_measurements_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES carbon_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_measurements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES carbon_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year during which data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement year (e.g., 'Data collected during spring 2022') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the carbon metric (e.g., Mean Carbon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., 'tons/ha') */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values for the metric (e.g., '0-100 tons/ha') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Government, NGO) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., public, private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Researcher, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_statistics" (
  "county_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county statistics entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "mean_carbon" REAL /* Average carbon content across all plots in the county */,
  "total_plots" INTEGER /* Total number of FIA plots in the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_carbon" REAL /* Total carbon content across all plots in the county */,
  "carbon_density" REAL /* Carbon density in the county (total carbon / total area) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
